result:
Updated entropy_hunt_v2.html to make the frontend simulation closer to the Entropy Hunt spec.

Changes:
- Reworked zone assignment to use deterministic BFT-style claim arbitration (distance, then drone id) instead of random winners.
- Fixed claim lifecycle so stale/kill events release owned zones and revive returns drones to a clean idle state.
- Cleaned telemetry/UI details: bft rounds label, packet-loss button state, warn/info log handling, and survivor-found progression.
